mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session (user1_id, user2_id, last_message, last_time, user1_unread, user2_unread) VALUES (#{user1Id}, #{user2Id}, #{lastMessage}, #{lastTime}, #{user1Unread}, #{user2Unread})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE user1_id = #{user1Id} AND user2_id = #{user2Id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_session WHERE user1_id = #{userId} OR user2_id = #{userId}
